debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℝ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
n k : ℕ
hn : n ≠ 0
hk : k ≠ 0
ε δ : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
hδ : δ > 0
hunif : ∀ x ∈ Set.Icc a b, ∀ y ∈ Set.Icc a b, |y - x| < δ → |f y - f x| < ε
hfine : 2 * (b - a) / ↑n < δ
j : ℕ
hj : j ∈ Finset.range n
ℓ : ℕ
hℓ : ℓ ∈ Finset.range k
⊢ |(↑ℓ + 1) * (b - a) / (↑n * ↑k) - (b - a) / ↑n| ≤ 2 * (b - a) / ↑n

failed_attempts:
have h_pos : 0 ≤ (b - a) / ↑n := div_nonneg (sub_nonneg.mpr hab.le) (Nat.cast_nonneg n)
  apply (abs_sub_le_abs_add_abs _ _).trans
  have h_a : (↑ℓ + 1) * (b - a) / (↑n * ↑k) = ((↑ℓ + 1) / ↑k) * ((b - a) / ↑n) := by
    field_simp [hn, hk]; ring
  rw [abs_of_nonneg h_pos, h_a, abs_of_nonneg]
  · have : (↑ℓ + 1 : ℝ) / ↑k ≤ 1 := by
      rw [div_le_one (Nat.cast_pos.mpr hk.bot_lt)]; norm_cast; exact Finset.mem_range.mp hℓ
    linarith
  · exact mul_nonneg (div_nonneg (Nat.cast_nonneg _) (Nat.cast_nonneg _)) h_pos
rw [abs_le]; constructor <;> { field_simp [Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr hn, Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr hk]; nlinarith [hab, mem_range.1 hℓ] }

rw [abs_le]
  constructor <;> { field_simp [hn, hk]; nlinarith [hab, Finset.mem_range.1 hℓ] }
rw [abs_le]; constructor <;> { field_simp [hn, hk]; nlinarith [hab, mem_range.mp hℓ] }
rw [abs_le]; constructor <;> { field_simp [hn, hk]; linarith [hab, mem_range.1 hℓ] }
rw [abs_le]; constructor <;> (field_simp [(by norm_cast : (n : ℝ) ≠ 0), (by norm_cast : (k : ℝ) ≠ 0)]; nlinarith [mem_range.mp hℓ])

rw [abs_le]; constructor <;> { field_simp [hn, hk]; nlinarith [Finset.mem_range.1 hℓ, hab] }
rw [abs_le]; constructor <;> (field_simp [Nat.cast_pos.mpr (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn), Nat.cast_pos.mpr (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hk)]; linarith [hab, hℓ])

rw [abs_le]
  have hnk : (0 : ℝ) < n * k := by norm_cast; exact Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (Nat.mul_ne_zero hn hk)
  constructor
  · field_simp [hn, hk]; rw [le_div_iff hnk]; nlinarith [hab, mem_range.1 hℓ]
  · field_simp [hn, hk]; rw [div_le_iff hnk]; nlinarith [hab, mem_range.1 hℓ]
rw [abs_le]; constructor <;> (field_simp [hn, hk]; nlinarith [hab, Finset.mem_range.mp hℓ])
rw [abs_le]; constructor <;> { field_simp [hn, hk]; nlinarith [mem_range.1 hℓ, hab] }

rw [abs_le]
  have hposn : (0 : ℝ) < n := Nat.cast_pos.2 (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn)
  have hposk : (0 : ℝ) < k := Nat.cast_pos.2 (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hk)
  constructor <;> { field_simp; nlinarith [Nat.cast_lt.2 (Finset.mem_range.1 hℓ), Nat.cast_nonneg ℓ] }
rw [abs_le]; constructor <;> (field_simp [hn, hk]; nlinarith [hab, Finset.mem_range.mp hℓ])

have : (ℓ : ℝ) < k := by exact_mod_cast Finset.mem_range.1 hℓ
  rw [abs_le]; constructor <;> { field_simp [hn, hk]; nlinarith [hab] }

have h_le : (↑ℓ + 1) * (b - a) / (↑n * ↑k) ≤ (b - a) / ↑n := by
    rw [mul_assoc, div_mul_eq_div_div, ← mul_div_assoc]
    exact div_le_self (div_nonneg (sub_nonneg.mpr hab.le) (by norm_cast; linarith)) (by norm_cast; linarith [hk])

    have : (k : ℝ) > 0 := by norm_cast; exact hk.bot_lt
    have : (ℓ : ℝ) < k := by norm_cast; exact Finset.mem_range.1 hℓ

sub_mul, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (div_nonneg (by linarith) hn0)]
